scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n WEB,GATEWAY,PROJECTS,TASKS -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm run dev --workspace @zample/web" "npm run dev --workspace @zample/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace @zample/projects-service" "npm run dev --workspace @zample/tasks-service"
